mapper.update: MERGE INTO region r USING ( SELECT #{apiAreaCode} AS api_area_code, #{apiSigunguCode} AS api_sigungu_code, #{sidoName} AS sido_name, #{sigunguName} AS sigungu_name FROM DUAL ) src ON ( r.api_area_code = src.api_area_code AND NVL(r.api_sigungu_code, 0) = NVL(src.api_sigungu_code, 0) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET r.sido_name = src.sido_name, r.sigungu_name = src.sigungu_name WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (region_id, sido_name, sigungu_name, api_area_code, api_sigungu_code) VALUES (region_seq.NEXTVAL, src.sido_name, src.sigungu_name, src.api_area_code, src.api_sigungu_code)
mapper.select: SELECT region_id, sido_name, api_area_code FROM region WHERE api_sigungu_code IS NULL AND api_area_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY api_area_code ASC

SELECT region_id AS regionId, sido_name AS sidoName, sigungu_name AS sigunguName, api_area_code AS apiAreaCode, api_sigungu_code AS apiSigunguCode FROM region WHERE sido_name = ( SELECT sido_name FROM region WHERE region_id = #{sidoId} ) AND api_sigungu_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sigungu_name ASC
